name: Freedom of Information Request
text:
Draw three cards. Then redact one of them: choose a card you drew this way and exile it face down. (The public has a right to know. Most of it.)
You may pay {3} to unredact (return the exiled card to your hand) at any time. The request is, regrettably, still being processed.
flavorText: Released in full, except for the parts, which were most of it.
